title: psychotria mauiensis var. subcordata
intro: Psychotria mauiensis var. subcordata, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ma'o hau hele are said to include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Ma'o hau hele include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
